tldr: Ensemble of GAPNet with ResNet18 backbone and ResNet34 with a dual classification-segmentation loss.
summary: The solution utilizes a diverse ensemble of approximately 25 models, specifically focusing on GAPNet and a dual-loss ResNet34. GAPNet was implemented using a ResNet18 backbone with SE-Blocks and trained on 512x512 RGB images. The ResNet34 model employed a dual loss consisting of a standard classification loss and a segmentation loss derived from the green channel of the image to act as a regularizer. Validation was performed using 5-fold cross-validation.
extensive_summary:
## Architecture and Strategy

The core strategy focused on model diversity to improve ensemble performance. The author utilized Keras for implementation and employed various cross-validation schemes. Initial experimentation was conducted using 256x256 RGB images to accelerate iteration speed.

## GAPNet Implementation

The author adapted the GAPNet architecture by replacing the original structure with a pretrained backbone, specifically ResNet18. To enhance performance, SE-Blocks were added before the Average Pooling layers. The model was trained on 512x512 RGB images using a weighted BCE and F1 loss with a cosine annealing learning rate schedule over 20 epochs. The author also incorporated HPA external data. A single 5-fold GAPNet model achieved a 0.602 Public LB, while an ensemble of four 5-fold GAPNet models (experimenting with different internal/external data proportions and cropping) achieved 0.609.

## Dual Loss ResNet

The author implemented a ResNet34 model featuring a dual loss mechanism. In addition to the standard classification loss, a segmentation loss was used as a regularizer. This was achieved by taking the output of the last 32x32x128 layer, applying a Conv2D to reach 32x32x28, and using a downsampled version of the green channel with corresponding labels as the ground truth mask. This supervised attention mechanism provided significant regularization benefits. Two 5-fold variants of this ResNet34 were trained, scoring 0.603 on the Public LB. When added to the GAPNet ensemble, the overall score improved to 0.618.
ensemble: Ensemble of four 5-fold GAPNet models and two 5-fold dual-loss ResNet34 models.
what_worked: supervised attention via segmentation loss as a regularizer
